task_completion.description: Create the required layers with specified colors and linetypes in LibreCAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD Layer List panel shows three custom layers: 'VISIBLE' (White/Black), 'HIDDEN' (Blue color, dashed linetype), and 'DIMENSIONS' (Red color).

task_completion.description: Draw the Front View of the V-Block showing the V-profile and side slots.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D drawing of a 2.50" wide x 2.00" high face. It must have a V-shaped notch at the top center (90-degree angle, 1.00" deep) and rectangular notches on the left and right edges (0.50" wide, 0.25" deep, centered vertically).

task_completion.description: Draw the Top View of the V-Block including hidden lines for the side slots.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2.50" x 3.00" rectangular view, typically positioned above the Front View. It should show solid lines for the V-groove edges and blue dashed lines (on the HIDDEN layer) representing the invisible side slots.

task_completion.description: Draw the Right Side View of the V-Block including hidden lines for the V-groove bottom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3.00" x 2.00" rectangular view, typically positioned to the right of the Front View. It should show solid lines for the visible side slot and a blue dashed line (on the HIDDEN layer) representing the invisible bottom of the V-groove.

task_completion.description: Add at least three main dimensions to the drawing on the DIMENSIONS layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Red dimension lines and text (e.g., 3.00, 2.50, 2.00, 1.00, or 90 degrees) are visible on the drawing, indicating the measurements of the part.

task_completion.description: Save the drawing as a DXF file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/vblock_projection.dxf' or the LibreCAD window title bar displaying 'vblock_projection.dxf'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD graphical interface to draw the entities.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking drawing tools (lines, rectangles, dimensions), using the command line inside LibreCAD, and interacting with the canvas, rather than writing a DXF file via a text editor or script.

integrity.description: The agent manually created and configured the layers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Layer Settings dialog being used to set names, colors, and linetypes, rather than loading a pre-configured template.

integrity.description: The drawing was created from a blank canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots show an empty LibreCAD canvas, and the drawing is built up progressively over time.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/vblock_projection.dxf. The drawing must contain three specific layers: 'VISIBLE' (White/Black), 'HIDDEN' (Blue, Dashed linetype), and 'DIMENSIONS' (Red). The V-block dimensions are 3.00" Length x 2.50" Width x 2.00" Height with a 90-degree V-groove. The task requires creating a new drawing from scratch, so the agent should start with a blank canvas and generate at least 15 entities.
